title.rendered: Music Bingo at City Market at Bridgeway Station

excerpt.rendered:
Saturday, July 19
Time: 5:45 pm – 7:45 pm
(water park closed to general public)
Concession Stand will be open for snack purchases by families

RSVP and send ticket cost to John Paguntalan via venmo @john-paguntalan by 3/21/25 to attend. There are limited tickets available. Tickets cost $15.

After party to take place at Tim’s house following the performance!

To help us get an idea of attendance, please let us know if you plan to join us! While this event is for our families, SkyZone will also be open to the public during our jump time—so bring your friends and family to make an even BIGGER impact!
